source_notebook: notebooks_standalone/DeepLog Enhanced -- HDFS Log Anomaly Detection.ipynb
architecture: Bidirectional LSTM, window=3, MLM pretraining + supervised fine-tuning
improvements_over_original: Bidirectional LSTM (vs unidirectional in Du et al. 2017)
Window size = 3 (vs 10 in original, optimal for short HDFS sessions)
Two-stage training: unsupervised MLM pretraining on normal sessions + supervised fine-tuning
Session scoring: max-aggregation (any anomalous window = anomaly)
FocalLoss in fine-tune stage for class imbalance
note: This result is from the HierAttnBlock Kaggle pipeline, not the standalone notebook 13 protocol.
